creator: edwin@mavetju.org
text:
On Tue, Sep 25, 2007 at 09:31:29PM +0000, Ade Lovett wrote:
> >Synopsis:       Migration from autoconf-2.5x to autoconf-2.61

Now that autoconf 2.5x will be removed from the system, is there
going to be documentation for porters and porters-to-be on how to
handle software whose *.am and *.in scripts are expecting the
availability of certain autoconf 2.5x specific macros and features?

Or is that all (more or less) backwards compatible?

Edwin
